title: ilex crenata f. longifolia
intro: Ilex crenata f. longifolia, also known as the long-leaved holly, is a variant of the Ilex crenata species, a type of evergreen shrub native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ilex crenata f. longifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and berries can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
